TAL (Theater Research Laboratory) Podcast Series Episode 6 is now available!

In this episode, Betül Kızılok Bavli and Yaşar Nezih Eyüboğlu discuss TAL’s ‘Borders’ Project. Answering questions from Zeynep Günsür Yüceil and Sevi Algan, they address the projects and rehearsal processes at TAL. You can access our podcast on Spotify and via the link on the @tal_arsiv profile.
